decisions.name: Functional Requirements
decisions.rationale: The system shall meet the following functional requirements: [{'title': 'Submit CV', 'description': 'Applicants can submit their CVs for parsing and analysis.', 'source': {'page': 16, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_f54beef3'}, {'title': 'View and Edit CV', 'description': 'Applicants can view and edit their parsed CV.', 'source': {'page': 16, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_f54beef3'}, {'title': 'Answer Screening Questions', 'description': 'Applicants are presented with screening questions defined by an expert recruiter.', 'source': {'page': 13, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_f54beef3'}, {'title': 'Get Rating for CV', 'description': 'The system generates a percentage-based result, providing a fair evaluation of each applicant.', 'source': {'page': 13, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_f54beef3'}]

decisions.name: Non-Functional Requirements
decisions.rationale: The system shall meet the following non-functional requirements: [{'title': 'Performance', 'description': 'The system MUST respond within 2 seconds to user input.', 'source': {'page': 21, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_f54beef3'}, {'title': 'Reliability', 'description': 'The system SHALL be available 99.99% of the time.', 'source': {'page': 21, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_f54beef3'}, {'title': 'Security', 'description': 'The system MUST protect user data and MUST NOT store sensitive information.', 'source': {'page': 21, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_f54beef3'}, {'title': 'Privacy', 'description': 'The system MUST NOT collect or store user data without explicit consent.', 'source': {'page': 21, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_f54beef3'}, {'title': 'Scalability', 'description': 'The system SHOULD be able to handle 1000 concurrent users.', 'source': {'page': 21, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_f54beef3'}, {'title': 'Usability', 'description': 'The system MUST be user-friendly and MUST provide clear instructions.', 'source': {'page': 21, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_f54beef3'}, {'title': 'Maintainability', 'description': 'The system SHOULD be easy to modify and update.', 'source': {'page': 21, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_f54beef3'}, {'title': 'Compatibility', 'description': 'The system MUST be compatible with major web browsers.', 'source': {'page': 22, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_f54beef3'}, {'title': 'Integration', 'description': 'The system MUST integrate with HR module from Odoo ERP software.', 'source': {'page': 22, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_f54beef3'}]

components.name: CV Editor
components.responsibility: Allow applicants to view and edit their parsed CVs

components.name: Screening Question Manager
components.responsibility: Manage and present screening questions defined by expert recruiters

components.name: Rating Generator
components.responsibility: Generate a percentage-based result for each applicant's CV

runtime_flow.action: Send screening questions and CV data
Send raw CV data for rating
